name: Hawaiian Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Divide the mixture evenly among four greased 13x9x2-inch baking pans.
3. Cover tightly with foil or place the lids on each pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
5. Uncover the pans and bake an additional 20-30 minutes, until heated through.
